title: Build a Fat JAR With Maven
summary: You can configure Maven to build a Fat JAR from your project containing all your project's compiled classes, and all classes of all dependencies your project uses, in single JAR file called a Fat JAR. Very useful for packaging microservices, executable JARs etc. - also inside a Docker container.
content: You can configure Maven to build a Fat JAR from your project containing all your project's compiled classes, and all classes of all dependencies your project uses, in single JAR file called a Fat JAR.
